title: T2 Producer/BA: digest.py --list + onboard project #2 (omi-fetch)
prompt: Give project-digest (~/dev/ad/apps/project-digest) its two missing generalization proofs so the T2 morning-briefing chain can loop over more than one project: (a) add a --list flag to digest.py wrapping the already-built lib/config.list_project_ids() (today used only inside an error message) — plain-text id/name/path lines, JSON array under --format json, exit-2 usage error when neither --list nor a project is given, existing single-project path byte-identical; (b) onboard project #2 — default omi-fetch (~/dev/ad/apps/omi-fetch; fall back to app-registry only if omi-fetch fails recon or David named another) via a minimal projects/omi-fetch.json (first-paragraph goal mode, registry_id omi-fetch, deliberately NO backlog/tickets keys — absent conventions must degrade to honest zeros, not errors), wiring extension-notes' #1 ranked item (the needs_you.markers config key that lib/needs_you.py currently ignores, with dark-factory.json's markers list synced to the built-ins so its recall is unchanged), and appending an honest 'Project #2 verdict' section to docs/extension-notes.md saying which of the three ranked generalization items needed real code vs worked out of the box. On success, close the superseded deferred engine ticket engine/store/queue/20260704T0630Z-project-digest-list-and-project-2.json: add a result noting 'superseded by wg-t2-03', keep its deferred_reason intact, move it to engine/store/done/. Commit and push both repos. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T2-03-digest-list-project-2.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: In ~/dev/ad/apps/project-digest: python3 digest.py --list exits 0 printing >=2 project ids (dark-factory + the onboarded #2), --list --format json parses as a JSON array with id/name/path per project, and digest.py with no args exits 2 with usage. python3 digest.py omi-fetch --no-write (and --format md / --format json) all exit 0, with goal.text non-empty and project_id omi-fetch; view/omi-fetch.html exists; store/last-briefing/ gained NO omi-fetch entry (all runs dry). lib/needs_you.py reads cfg needs_you.markers, and digest.py dark-factory --format json --no-write still reports needs_you.total_found >= 1 (recall preserved). docs/extension-notes.md contains a 'Project #2 verdict' section and README.md documents --list. In ~/dev/ad/apps/dark-factory: engine/store/queue/ no longer holds 20260704T0630Z-project-digest-*, engine/store/done/ does, the moved JSON parses, contains 'superseded by wg-t2-03', and still carries its original deferred_reason. Negative: no writes into ~/dev/ad/apps/omi-fetch, no --all loop, no LLM calls, lib/assemble.py and lib/store.py untouched. Both repos committed and pushed.
